{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Cha’tur’niak, Devourer of Dimensions
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Waybound (novel)|Waybound]]
}}

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Cha’tur’niak, Devourer of Dimensions]], is a being that eats worlds.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c38">''Waybound'', chapter 38</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
